SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.impl

Class ViewElectionCycleTemporalTrends

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.impl.ViewElectionCycleTemporalTrends
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject, java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="ViewElectionCycleTemporalTrends") public class ViewElectionCycleTemporalTrends extends java.lang.Object implements com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject
The Class ViewElectionCycleTemporalTrends. JPA Entity for view_election_cycle_temporal_trends database view. Provides temporal trends across Swedish parliamentary election cycles (4-year periods), aggregating behavioral patterns, voting activity, decision outcomes, and committee productivity.

Intelligence Value: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ VERY HIGH

  • Cross-cycle comparative analysis - benchmark performance across election periods
  • Pre-election pattern detection - identify behavioral changes before elections
  • Seasonal analysis - compare autumn vs spring semester patterns
  • Multi-dimensional intelligence - aggregate behavioral, voting, decision, committee data
Since:
v1.51 (Election Cycle Analytics)
Author:
intelligence-operative
See Also:
  • Composite key
  • Serialized Form
